<p class="key-answer" data-question="Methylnaltrexone Bromide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Methylnaltrexone Bromide</strong> 目前有 <strong>11 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Methylnaltrexone Bromide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of opioid-induced constipation in advanced-illness patients who are receiving palliative care when response to usual laxative therapy has not been sufficient.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（78.3%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（77.3%）</li>
<li>exercise-induced malignant hyperthermia（76.6%）</li>
<li>common cold（76.4%）</li>
<li>alopecia（75.4%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（75.3%）</li>
<li>respiratory failure（72.0%）</li>
<li>familial periodic paralysis（71.3%）</li>
<li>obsolete hyperuricemia (disease)（71.2%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（67.6%）</li>
<li>adrenal gland pheochromocytoma（67.2%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of adrenal medulla（66.8%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（66.7%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（66.0%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（65.5%）</li>
<li>hypokalemic periodic paralysis（65.3%）</li>
<li>duodenum cancer（63.3%）</li>
<li>adrenal medulla cancer（63.0%）</li>
<li>sympathetic nervous system disease（62.0%）</li>
<li>hypouricemia, renal（61.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
